# terrible_community_general_consul_role (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) A name used to identify the role.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the role. If not specified, the assigned description is not changed.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `node_identities` (String) List of node identities to attach to the role. If not specified, any node identities currently assigned are not changed. If the parameter is an empty array (`[]`), any node identities assigned are unassigned.
- `policies` (String) List of policies to attach to the role. Each policy is a dict. If the parameter is left blank, any policies currently assigned are not changed. Any empty array (`[]`) clears any policies previously set.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `service_identities` (String) List of service identities to attach to the role. If not specified, any service identities currently assigned are not changed. If the parameter is an empty array (`[]`), any node identities assigned are unassigned.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) Whether the role should be present or absent.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `templated_policies` (String) The list of templated policies that should be applied to the role.
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `operation` (String) The operation performed on the role.
- `role` (String) The role object.
